creator: amendlik@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Cy Schubert from comment #38)

I never said I couldn't apply a patch, only that I had never done it before. I also build my own ports, so I'm not sure why it's important that I'm a binary package user. I'm open to try any suggestion. I am just having a very hard time following the conversation because it's not clear to me how you are reaching your conclusions.

My research shows that we need to use OpenSSH with GSSAPI to use service ticket based-authentication. But I see you saying that we need to disable GSSAPI and use PAM instead. I provided the documentation that says PAM is not what we need, so it would be helpful if you could explain your thoughts on this or tell me what I'm missing.

BTW, I have downloaded the source code and applied the patch. I still need to figure out how to "activate" it, and the rest should be pretty easy.
